docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2009 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAMAYOA, LEOPOLODO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHORGE, JIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMAYOA, LEOPOLODO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT COMMITTED A MATERIAL BREACH OF THE RELEASE AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, AND THE COURT RESCINDS THE AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO DEFT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KHORGE, JIM AS TO DEFENDANT SAMAYOA, LEOPOLODO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
